The minimal SPIR-V fragment shader, encoded as a little-endian hex string, is:

`030223070000010000000000000000050000000000020011000000010003000e00000000000000010005000f00000004000000046e69616d000000000003001500000002000000000003002100000003000000020005003600000002000000040000000000000003000200f800000005000100fd000100f9`
